inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Which CRUD operation to perform on an artifact. create scaffolds; update edits in place; review audits (read-only); delete removes.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Target name (kebab-case). Prompted if absent when mode=create.

inputs.name: scope
inputs.description: override | workspace | user. Required when mode=create.

inputs.name: uri
inputs.description: Existing artifact URI. Required when mode is update, review, or delete.

inputs.name: instructions
inputs.description: Free-form description. Required when mode=update; optional for review (focus hints); ignored for create/delete.

outputs.name: uri
outputs.description: URI of the artifact acted on (created, updated, reviewed, or deleted).

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Review-note artifact URI when mode=review; absent otherwise.

steps.description: Read the target artifact (artifact.get) for update / review / delete modes. Refuse plugin-scope paths.
Create: prompt for metadata and produce candidate content. Update: apply instructions to the loaded content. Runs the workflow-contract validator on any workflow/artifact-template output.
Run workflow-conformance.sh + heuristics (naming, reachability, dead transitions, missing descriptions). Produce a structured review note.

gate.prompt: Approve (create/update: the draft; delete: the removal; review: write the report)?

steps.description: Fire the user gate appropriate to the mode. For review: approve writing the review-note artifact. For delete: confirm destruction. For create/update: approve the draft/diff.

Create: resolve path (authoring.resolve_path) and artifact.create. Update: artifact.update on the existing URI. Review: artifact.create a review-note document referencing the target. Delete: artifact.delete.
